title: UAE weather alert: Hottest 40 days of summer begin July 3 as 'Jamrat Al Qayth' pushes temperatures above 50°C
summary_full: The UAE braces for its most intense summer phase, 'Jamrat Al Qayth,' starting July 3 and lasting until August 10. Temperatures are predicted to soar above 50°C, with experts warning of scorching heat, dry winds, and heatwaves. Coastal areas will see highs of 41-43°C, while inland regions could reach 45-46°C. Residents are urged to take precautions against extreme heat and humidity.
